query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A field of tall yellow and orange flowers with green stems stretches across the lower portion of the frame, with slender tree trunks rising in the background against a pale blue sky. The scene appears to be captured with vertical motion streaking throughout. A watermark in the lower right corner reads 'bspurgeon.dpchallenge.com'.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred scene of yellow and orange flowers with green stems streaked vertically into abstract color bands, with tree trunks in the background similarly smeared into elongated blurs against a pale sky. The extreme softening and directional blur obliterates all fine detail, rendering the subjects into flowing ribbons of clashing warm and cool color rather than recognizable botanical forms. A watermark in the lower right corner reads 'bspurgeon.dpchallenge.com'.
